summary: A clipped TV news interview of Acting Labor Secretary Keith Sonderling (Bloomberg 'Big Take' and Newsmax) saying jobs, manufacturing and industry are 'coming back,' intercut with a Fed/Powell news shot. It is a broadcast talking-head segment with channel bugs, a lower-third name plate, and a scrolling chyron, and it has no music bed.
notable_text: KEITH SONDERLING ACTING SECRETARY OF LABOR; POWELL: VERY AWARE PEOPLE ARE EXPERIENCING HIGHER PRICES; NEWSMAX
